title: One way I could earn without trading time
subtitle: A journal prompt set for finding one concrete non-hours income idea.
excerpt: A journal prompt set from Week 5 of the MONEY program. Five prompts for identifying one real income route that does not depend directly on your hours.
sourceNotes: Adapted from the Week 5 daily reflection prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).

practice.whenToUse: Use when you want to move from the concept of non-hours income to one specific idea.

content.text: A journal prompt set from Week 5 of the MONEY program. Not a strategy session: this is one slow question at a time, finding what's already sitting in your thinking.
New to journalling as a practice? Read
What does earning look like in my life right now?
Write the actual picture: how income arrives, what it depends on, what disappears if you stop.
What would I enjoy doing that could also earn?
Write the idea without editing for practicality yet. Any idea counts.
Have I ever had an idea for non-hours income that I dismissed?
Write what it was. What made you put it down?
What skills or knowledge do I have that others pay for?
Write plainly. What do people ask you about? What do you do easily that others find hard?
What is the one income idea I would try if I knew it could work?
Write one idea. One. Not a list.
Adapted from the Week 5 daily reflection prompts in The Money Journal: 12 Weeks to Peace, Freedom and Overflow (Rebecca J Page, 2025).
